title: 皐月賞の後に・すべてのウマ娘の憧れ

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Thanks for coming to see me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Thanks for coming to see me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, it was great! It always feels so good to run!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Still, I can't let myself be content.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll keep going full blast until everyone is chasing after me!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Great job! Today's race was so exciting!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: It felt like your strength, your drive, your everything has improved since the previous race.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's right! Most of all, you looked like you were
having a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Teehee! I'm glad to see I got the message across!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But next time, I'll show you an even better race!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The race coming up is considered the most
prestigious of the year, after all...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's a huge spectacle, and I'm going to give
everyone a race that'll have them glued to their
seats!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm really looking forward to it! Best of
luck!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making it through some big races,
Maruzensky's next goal is the Japanese
Derby—the pinnacle of racing!
